The '''''Kraken''''' was an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] that formed part of the [[Corrupter Task Force]] under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]]. The ship was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ollender]].

The ''Kraken'' served as an escort for the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] during the latter's hunt for the [[Defiance Task Force]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. She was ambushed along with her task force when two Rebel [[A-wing]]s raided the fleet in an attempt to prevent the launch of Imperial [[Probe droid/Legends|Probe droids]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
